Attack.description: Primary offensive player responsible for scoring and offensive execution from the offensive end of the field
Attack.position_focus: Offensive execution, shot placement, creating for teammates from X and top of offense

Midfield.description: Hybrid position playing both offense and defense; must have endurance, versatility, and all-around skills
Midfield.position_focus: Transition play, two-way contributions, ground ball production, field control

Defense.description: Dedicated defensive player responsible for shutting down attackers and protecting the crease area
Defense.position_focus: One-on-one defense, crease protection, ground ball production, transition outlets

Goalie.description: Goalkeeper responsible for defending the goal, directing defense, and initiating clears
Goalie.position_focus: Goal defense, save percentage, directing defense, clear execution, handling pressure

FOGO.description: Face-Off Specialist (FOGO) - dedicated faceoff player who exits the field after possession secured
FOGO.position_focus: Faceoff success, ground ball conversion, quick transitions, possession battle dominance

6s_adjustments.description: In 6s (sixes) lacrosse, position roles shift significantly due to smaller field, faster tempo, and absence of faceoffs
key_changes: No FOGO role - possession alternates after goals
Transition speed is critical to pace of play
All field players must be capable scorers
Ground balls less common due to faster pace
6s_adjustments.notes: In 6s, athletes must be more versatile and capable across shooting, dodging, and transition. Field size (70x36 yards) demands quick decision-making and high ball movement. All players should develop scoring ability.

skill_definitions.shooting: Ability to score from various distances and angles; includes release speed, accuracy, and footwork
skill_definitions.dodging: 1v1 ball-handling ability to create space and evade defenders using footwork and stick handling
skill_definitions.passing: Accuracy and timing of passes; includes both feed passes and transition outlet passes
skill_definitions.field_awareness: Understanding of field positioning, spacing, and defensive gaps; anticipation of plays
skill_definitions.ground_balls: Ability to win loose balls, scoop, and secure possession in transition moments
skill_definitions.transition: Speed of converting defense-to-offense; moving the ball quickly up-field
skill_definitions.defense: One-on-one defending, positioning, stick checks, and overall defensive fundamentals
skill_definitions.faceoff: Dominance at the X; winning possessions and controlling ground balls immediately after faceoff
